title: Preference key without module name prefix
description: SetPreference() or GetPreference() uses a very short generic key. Note: CMSMS scopes module preferences per-module internally, so collision risk is low. This is informational only.
explanation: CMSMS stores all module preferences in a shared table. Short generic keys like 'enabled', 'mode', 'limit' can collide across modules. Prefix with the module name or a unique abbreviation.
